items.title: The Home Depot, Inc. (HD) Successfully Acquires GMS Inc. for $5.5 Billion
items.description: With strong profitability, The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) secures a spot on our list of the 11 Most Profitable Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Right Now. The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) expanded its presence in the construction materials sector on September 4, 2025, when it successfully acquired GMS Inc. for $5.5 billion through SRS Distribution Inc., its […]

items.title: Useful Gifts - Not Luxury - Top Millennial and Gen Z Wish Lists This Holiday Season
items.description: The countdown to the holidays is officially on, and this season more than three-quarters of Millennials want practical gifts for their homes, according to a new survey conducted by Morning Consult for The Home Depot. Beginning on October 28, customers can save on tools, smart home devices, appliances, home decor and more throughout the season – both in stores and online.

items.title: Want Decades of Passive Income? Buy This Index Fund and Hold It Forever
items.author: Bram Berkowitz
items.description: The Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (SCHD) offers investors a low-cost way to gain exposure to reliable dividend-paying large-cap U.S. stocks across multiple sectors, with a 3.82% dividend yield and consistent performance.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Low expense ratio (0.06%), strong dividend yield (3.82%), diversified holdings across sectors, and consistent performance over time
63-year history of paying and increasing annual dividends
56-year history of paying and increasing annual dividends
Included as a representative pharmaceutical company in the ETF's diverse holdings
Included as a representative oil company in the ETF's diverse holdings
Included as a representative home improvement company in the ETF's diverse holdings

items.title: 2 Mega-Cap Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 We Question
items.description: Megacap stocks dominate their sectors and their actions influence economies worldwide. The flip side though is that their sheer size means they have less room for explosive growth as scale works against them.
